item.title: 🔥 AI agents pay-per-use boom?x402 crashes 92%—doubt rises on autonomous commerce. Virtuals Protocol aGDP hits $479M. source: https://Blockchain.News/news/okx-ventures-ai-agent-economy-x402-transactions-drop-92-percent #AI #crypto #Web3
